overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through a futuristic neon-lit commercial district. The player exits a covered pedestrian arcade into bright sunlight, navigates a busy intersection with distinctive architecture, and proceeds through a waterfront plaza lined with tropical vegetation and corporate buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with food vendors

events.description: begins walking through covered concrete arcade with arched ceilings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway toward the bright exit ahead

entered.detail: large curved concrete arch structure forming the corridor ceiling
food vendor stall with illuminated signage and menu displays
vertical digital billboard displaying red and black advertisement graphics
circular recessed lighting fixtures in the concrete ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a covered concrete pedestrian arcade with arched ceilings and artificial lighting. The camera moves forward through the corridor toward a bright exit, passing a food stall on the right with illuminated signage and digital posters.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street with neon signage

events.description: exits the covered arcade into bright sunlight and open urban street
approaches crosswalk and slows slightly while navigating around pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past storefronts with neon signs, approaching a crosswalk

notable_agents.action: person in brown coat standing near the crosswalk waiting to cross

entered.detail: multi-story commercial building with prominent red neon 'Hometown deli' signage on roof
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk in front of buildings
tall building with large 'HOTEL' signage and multiple billboards
blue metal railing separating sidewalk from street level

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a bright sunlit commercial street. The prominent Hometown deli building with its red neon signage dominates the right side, while palm trees line the sidewalk. The camera continues walking past various storefronts with colorful neon signs, approaching a crosswalk with scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with crosswalk and traffic

events.description: begins crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk as vehicles pass by
continues across the intersection while looking toward passing traffic

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with yellow crosswalk markings while cars drive past

notable_agents.action: vintage-style cars driving through the intersection, including a green sports car

entered.detail: distinctive yellow elevated walkway structure with 'BD SHACK' neon signage
broad yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt
tall building-mounted advertisement showing food items and text

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a busy urban intersection marked with bold yellow crosswalk stripes. The distinctive yellow BD Shack overpass spans the left side of the frame while various futuristic vehicles drive through the intersection. The camera moves steadily across the asphalt toward the opposite sidewalk.

events.description: enters quieter plaza area with large concrete planters and tropical vegetation
moves into shaded area with dense tree cover and dappled sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza passing large concrete planters with tropical plants

entered.detail: large rectangular concrete planters with glowing blue neon trim containing tropical plants
dense palm trees and leafy plants in raised beds along the walkway
building with prominent 'WILD' signage in teal neon letters
distant view of water and horizon beyond the commercial buildings

segments.scene_description: Leaving the busy street behind, the scene transitions to a quieter waterfront promenade lined with large concrete planters featuring glowing blue neon edges and tropical vegetation. The walkway is paved with light tiles and shaded by palm trees, with the 'WILD' club building visible on the right and a distant waterfront view ahead.

events.description: approaches denser commercial area with softsys building and food kiosks

agents.ego_description: approaching the softsys building and surrounding commercial storefronts

entered.detail: teal and white building with prominent 'softsys' corporate signage
futuristic white and blue food vendor booth with closed shutters
outdoor escalator entrance leading to upper levels of the commercial complex

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a dense commercial plaza featuring the distinctive teal 'softsys' building. A futuristic food kiosk sits on the left while an escalator structure leads to upper levels ahead. The environment shifts from the open waterfront promenade to a more enclosed commercial district with multiple storefronts and corporate signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dim, enclosed pedestrian arcade into a sprawling, sun-drenched futuristic commercial district. It begins by moving through a concrete corridor with arched ceilings and artificial light, passing an illuminated food stall before emerging into the bright glare of a sunlit street. As the camera advances, the environment opens up to reveal palm trees and the red neon signage of a Hometown deli, leading the viewer across a busy urban intersection marked by bold yellow stripes and a massive yellow overpass. The scene then shifts away from the traffic toward a quieter waterfront promenade, where the pavement turns to light tiles and the landscape is defined by tropical greenery and glowing blue neon planters. Finally, the path leads into a dense commercial plaza, transitioning from the open waterfront to an enclosed corporate hub featuring the teal softsys building and a futuristic food kiosk.
